reviews.comment:
Lugar antiguo.....pero eso no es nada.
El tema es que paramos para ingresar al baño y un mozo re mal educado nos paro en seco....con malos modos preguntando donde ibamos. Le dije que necesitaba pasar al baño....y bueno, ahi termina el tema. La pregunta es :
Es necesario tener un empleado que maltrate asi a las personas? Hablando de mal modo a mi esposo? Cuando yo le dije que necesitaba pasar al baño....bajó el tono....que mal dejan parado al lugar, al que sin duda, no regresaré!
La persona es un hombre de unos 40 años, delgado, pelo oscuro y mul mal trato!

(Translated by Google)
It's an old place... but that's nothing.
The thing is, we stopped to use the restroom and a really rude waiter stopped us dead in our tracks... rudely asking where we were going. I told him I needed to use the restroom... and well, that's where it ends. The question is: Is it necessary to have an employee who mistreats people like that? Speaking rudely to my husband? When I told him I needed to use the restroom... he lowered his voice... it makes the place look bad, and I certainly won't be returning!
The person is a man around 40 years old, thin, with dark hair, and very rude!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURnc3VTWlBREAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente calidad de los productos. Aconsejo el pejetrey. Fresco y de la laguna. El cafe es el mejor. Hace mas de 20 años que paro alli al viajar

(Translated by Google)
Excellent quality products. I recommend the silverside fish. Fresh and from the lagoon. The coffee is the best. I've been stopping there when I travel for over 20 years.
